name: Recycled Chromium, Cobalt, and Nickel Exclusion

eligibility.description: The metal must be diverted from solid waste and not part of the original manufacturing process; requires completed environmental corrective actions if any were ordered.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts chromium, cobalt, or nickel from tax if recovered in the U.S. from solid waste as part of a recycling process.
